name: com.jorgeehdeez.input-prompts
description: Dynamic on-screen input prompt legend for the Unity New Input System. Resolves bound controls to icons and adapts to the last device used (Keyboard/Mouse, Xbox, PlayStation; generic gamepad fallback). Includes a one-click installer and auto-fill editor tools.

samples.description: UI_Canvas and Row prefabs plus Kenney input sprites (CC0) to try the installer.
